tasks.title: Implement RevalidationService.revalidateEntity() with debouncing
tasks.description: In revalidation.service.ts implement revalidateEntity({ event }): Promise<void>. Read entity config via getEntityConfig(). Check enabled+autoRevalidateOnChange. Clear existing timeout. Schedule new setTimeout with debounceMs. On timeout: getAffectedPaths(), adapter.revalidateMany(), logResults(). All errors caught - fire-and-forget. Tests: see T-053.

On timeout: compute paths, revalidate, log results

tasks.title: Implement RevalidationService.revalidatePaths()
tasks.description: Implement revalidatePaths({ paths, reason, triggeredBy }): Promise<ReadonlyArray<RevalidationResult>>. No debouncing - immediate. Call adapter.revalidateMany({ paths }), then logResults with trigger='manual'. Return results. Tests: see T-053.

subtasks.title: Call logResults with trigger='manual' and triggeredBy

tasks.title: Implement private resolvers: resolveAccommodationPaths, resolveDestinationPaths
tasks.description: In revalidation.service.ts add private resolveAccommodationPaths(): Promise<ReadonlyArray<string>>. Query AccommodationModel.findAll({}, { pageSize: 9999 }). For each: lookup destination via DestinationModel.findById. Build EntityChangeData. Call getAffectedPaths(). Same for resolveDestinationPaths() querying DestinationModel. Tests: see T-053.

tasks.title: Implement private resolvers: resolveEventPaths, resolvePostPaths
tasks.description: resolveEventPaths(): query EventModel.findAll, build EntityChangeData per event (no external lookup needed). resolvePostPaths(): query PostModel.findAll, pass empty tagSlugs (acceptable for cron - avoids N+1). Both return paths via getAffectedPaths(). Tests: see T-053.

subtasks.title: Add JSDoc explaining tagSlugs is empty for cron performance reasons

tasks.title: Implement RevalidationService.revalidateByEntityType() and private helpers
tasks.description: Implement revalidateByEntityType({ entityType }): Promise<ReadonlyArray<RevalidationResult>>. Build entityResolvers map. Get paths from resolver, deduplicate, slice to maxCronRevalidations, call adapter.revalidateMany, logResults with trigger='cron'. Also implement private getEntityConfig() (reads RevalidationConfigModel) and private logResults() (iterates results, creates log entries per result). Tests: see T-053.

subtasks.title: Deduplicate paths (Set) and apply maxCronRevalidations limit

tasks.title: Create page-revalidation.job.ts cron job
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/cron/jobs/page-revalidation.job.ts with CronJobDefinition. schedule reads from env.HOSPEDA_REVALIDATION_CRON_SCHEDULE. Handler: 1) get revalidationService (return early if not initialized), 2) read all enabled configs, 3) for each: check if interval elapsed since last cron entry, 4) call revalidateByEntityType if due, 5) delete log entries older than 30 days. Tests: see T-085.

Limit stale detection to 48h window for performance. Tests: see T-085.
